title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Medtronic India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
